title: Deterministic multi-missing key reporting
goal: Change validate_session_required_keys to collect all missing keys, sort them, and report them in a single error instead of stopping at the first missing key
scope: Change error reporting from first-missing-stop to collect-all-sort-report
Do NOT add any new required keys
Add focused tests for deterministic multi-key reporting
out_of_scope: Adding new required keys (allowed_changes, forbidden_changes, acceptance_criteria)
constraints: existing required keys remain exactly: session_id, phase_id, title, goal, scope, out_of_scope, constraints, acceptance_ref
do not add or remove any required key
do not change main() control flow
do not change provider, retry, report, or builder/reviewer flow
allowed_changes_detail: orchestration/run_session.py::validate_session_context to delegate to validate_session_required_keys (no key set change)
forbidden_changes: SESSION_REQUIRED_KEYS contents (do not add or remove keys)
acceptance_criteria: AC-107b-01: single missing key still reports that key name in error [test_single_missing_key_reports_key_name]
AC-107b-02: multiple missing keys are collected sorted and reported in one error [test_multiple_missing_keys_sorted_single_error]
AC-107b-03: valid session JSON with all existing required keys passes without error [test_valid_session_passes]
AC-107b-04: validate_session_context delegates key checking to validate_session_required_keys [test_context_delegates_to_required_keys]
AC-107b-05: all existing tests pass unchanged [manual_4_command_verification]
